h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner proceeds linearly through the columns applying the field-value rule.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue attempting to fill out the worksheet rows by strictly following the tutor's text-based formatting rules.
